organic.title: Top CSE Colleges India by Placement 2024 - NIRF Engineering Rankings
organic.snippet: Top 10 CSE/IT placement institutions India 2024 (NIRF): VIT Vellore (412 software placements, 86%), SRM Chennai (289, 84%), BITS Pilani (231, 89%), Anna University (198, 78%), KIIT Bhubaneswar (174, 81%), Amrita Coimbatore (152, 79%), Thapar Patiala (138, 82%), VIT Chennai (124, 83%), Manipal (118, 80%), DTU Delhi (102, 88%).
